SELECT event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH) FROM dates;
SELECT event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AS next_year FROM dates WHERE event_date < DATE '2023-12-31';
SELECT event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 15 DAY) FROM dates WHERE event_date > DATE '1990-01-01';
WITH date_modifications AS (SELECT event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) AS modified_date FROM dates) SELECT modified_date FROM date_modifications;
SELECT d1.event_date, d2.event_date, date_add(d1.event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS modified_date FROM dates d1 JOIN dates d2 ON d1.event_date < d2.event_date;
SELECT event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL CASE WHEN event_date < DATE '2020-01-01' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END DAY) AS conditional_date FROM dates;
CREATE TABLE events (event_name VARCHAR, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO events VALUES ('Event A', DATE '2022-07-15'), ('Event B', DATE '2023-03-10');
SELECT event_name, event_date, date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS event_next_month FROM events WHERE date_add(event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) < DATE '2023-12-31';

SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date, d.event_date AS comparison_date, date_add(e.event_date, INTERVAL d.event_date MONTH) AS date_with_interval FROM events e JOIN dates d ON MONTH(e.event_date) < MONTH(d.event_date);
